data_request.notes: Goal: summarize Apple's market performance over the last year ending 2026-02-02 (compute return from adj_close, describe trend/volatility, and volume behavior).

agent_response: Next step: fetch AAPL daily OHLCV (including adj_close) from 2025-02-02 through 2026-02-02 (UTC). Use adj_close to compute 1-year total return and identify major drawdowns/recoveries; use monthly_avg plus monthly_max/min to characterize trend and volatility; use volume to note notable spikes or regime shifts. After DATA arrives, produce a concise summary citing provider and the returned date range.
